use rayon::ThreadPoolBuilder;

// BAD: library code building global Rayon pool
pub mod analytics {
    use super::*;

    pub fn init() {
        ThreadPoolBuilder::new()
            .num_threads(4)
            .build_global()
            .unwrap();
    }

    pub fn process_events(events: &[Event]) -> Vec<ProcessedEvent> {
        init(); // called on first use
        events.par_iter().map(|e| process(e)).collect()
    }
}

pub mod indexer {
    use super::*;

    pub fn build_index(docs: &[Document]) -> Index {
        ThreadPoolBuilder::new()
            .num_threads(8)
            .build_global() // panics if already built
            .unwrap();

        docs.par_iter().map(|doc| index_doc(doc)).collect()
    }
}
